name: cron_unknown_agent_alert
_purpose: Cron diario 09:30 que vigila la regresion del bug A2 (agent omite agent_name -> util_llm_call cae al default 'unknown_agent'). Si en las ultimas 24h hay >=1 llamada a llm_calls con agent_name IN ('unknown_agent','unknown',''), envia alerta critica al architect_email con detalle (modelos, proyectos, primera/ultima ocurrencia, accion correctiva). Si count = 0, NoOp silencioso.
_audit_reference: studio-multiagente/docs/fase_a_audit.md (seccion A2 confirma todos los agentes vivos hardcoded; este cron blinda contra regresion futura)

nodes.name: Load Architect Email
nodes._query: SELECT value AS architect_email FROM system_config WHERE key = 'architect_email' LIMIT 1

nodes.name: Count Unknown Calls
nodes._query: SELECT count(*)::int AS total_unknown, array_agg(DISTINCT model) FILTER (...) AS models, array_agg(DISTINCT project_id::text) FILTER (...) AS project_ids, count(*) FILTER (status='error')::int AS errors, min/max(occurred_at) FROM llm_calls WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND agent_name IN ('unknown_agent','unknown','')
